outlook.summary: Market trapped in negative gamma regime with spot (674.21) below Max Pain cluster (683-685). Heavy put concentration creates structural support at 660, while 700 serves as impenetrable resistance. Bearish skew (1.47-1.57) and elevated PCR (1.65-5.43) confirm downside bias. Expect volatile conditions with magnetic pull toward 683-685 zone unless 660 support fails.
